steps.title: Key insight: f must be constant
steps.content: Since f(0) = 17 and f(1) = 17, both are equal. A linear function f(x) = mx + b with f(0) = f(1) must have slope m = 0, so f is constant: f(x) = 17. Now verify each choice.

steps.title: Backsolving — testing choice C (17)
steps.content:
Testing choice C: $$f(x) = 17$$
Then $$f(0) = 17$$ and $$f(1) = 17$$, which exactly match both given conditions. ✓

That matches choice C — C is correct.
